response.overview: What does it really mean to have someone by your side? We often take the people closest to us for granted, assuming they’ll always be there. This heartfelt advertisement reminds us that love isn’t always expressed through words—it can be found in quiet sacrifices, unwavering support, and the small moments that shape our lives. It may not tell you how to appreciate the people you love, but it might inspire you to see them with new eyes before it’s too late.
response.title: Sister
